publicBooking.title: Book a slot
publicBooking.noSlots: No slots available on this day
publicBooking.success: You're booked! A confirmation SMS will arrive shortly.
publicBooking.barberNotFound: Barber not found or link expired.
publicBooking.barberNotAvailable: This barber is not accepting bookings right now.
publicBooking.slotTaken: Sorry, that slot was just taken. Pick another one.

barberLink.title: My booking link
barberLink.subtitle: Share this link with your clients — they can book you directly.
barberLink.directLinkDescription: Opens in a browser. Customers verify their phone with an SMS code (free).
barberLink.telegramLinkDescription: Opens in the Telegram bot. The customer's phone is verified automatically by Telegram.
barberLink.smsNotifyTitle: Send SMS when a booking arrives?
barberLink.smsNotifyDescription: When enabled, you'll get an SMS on your phone every time a customer books through your link. The SMS cost is deducted from your balance.
barberLink.personalBotDescription: Share this bot with your customers. Once a customer shares their phone with the bot, you can message them directly and notify them about bookings.
barberLink.otpDescription: When enabled, customers booking through your link must confirm their phone with an SMS code. Protects against fake bookings. Each confirmation SMS is billed to your balance.
barberLink.enterOtp: Enter the code sent to your phone
barberLink.otpDailyLimit: Daily limit reached for this phone number
barberLink.otpFailed: Could not send SMS, try again later

settings.workingHoursHint: These hours apply to all barbers; schedules are generated within this range.

settings.ownerOnly: Only the barbershop owner can change settings.
settings.generateHint: Based on the configured hours, schedules will be created for every barber for the upcoming days. Existing days are skipped unless overwritten.

adminBarberBot.title: Barber's Telegram bot
adminBarberBot.description: The barber's own bot for sending notifications to their customers. Get a token from @BotFather and paste it here.

adminBarberBot.detachConfirm: This barber's personal bot will be removed. Customers will receive messages from the Lope Style bot instead. Continue?

reminderSettings.shopManagedTitle: Setting controlled by the shop owner
reminderSettings.shopManagedDescription: You are attached to a barbershop. Reminder SMS settings are configured by the shop owner and apply to every barber in the shop.
